[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101100 3
1 0101010 3
2 1000010 2
3 0110000 2
4 1011111 6
5 0101001 3
6 1000110 3
7 0000111 3

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0000110 2
23 32 0000100 1
34 43 0101000 2
45 54 0000010 1
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0001001 2

02 20 0000001 1
13 31 0000100 1
24 42 0000010 1
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 1000010 2 match 2
60 06 0100000 1
71 17 1000110 3 match 6

03 30 0101000 2
14 41 0000010 1
25 52 0000010 1
36 63 0100000 1
47 74 0001010 2
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0000000 a
72 27 0000111 3 match 7

15 51 1000010 2 match 2
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0001100 2
